name: Update eco news with invalid data -- @1.1
fullName: Update Eco News: Update eco news with invalid data

steps.name: Given the user is authorized

When I send PUT request to update eco news with id 32 and {"id":"32","source":"https://example.org","shortInfo":"Climate change update","tags":["not","not"],"title":"Climate change update","content":"Full article text here","titleTranslation":{"content":"Climate News","languageCode":"not"},"textTranslation":{"content":"Full article text here","languageCode":"not"}}:
Then the response status code should be 400
And the response message should be Current user has no permission for this action

parameters.name: data
parameters.value: {"id":"32","source":"https://example.org","shortInfo":"Climate change update","tags":["not","not"],"title":"Climate change update","content":"Full article text here","titleTranslation":{"content":"Climate News","languageCode":"not"},"textTranslation":{"content":"Full article text here","languageCode":"not"}}

parameters.name: message
parameters.value: Current user has no permission for this action

parameterValues: {"id":"32","source":"https://example.org","shortInfo":"Climate change update","tags":["not","not"],"title":"Climate change update","content":"Full article text here","titleTranslation":{"content":"Climate News","languageCode":"not"},"textTranslation":{"content":"Full article text here","languageCode":"not"}}
